translations.en: Can you turn off the tap?
translations.nb: Vær så snill, skru igjen kranen.
translations.ja: 蛇口を閉めてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; informal; subject of the verb.

sentences.target: Le robinet fuit encore ce matin.

translations.fr: Le robinet fuit encore ce matin.
translations.en: The tap is leaking again this morning.
translations.es: El grifo está goteando otra vez esta mañana.
translations.de: Der Wasserhahn tropft heute Morgen schon wieder.
translations.it: Il rubinetto perde di nuovo stamattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 水龙头今天早上又漏水。
translations.pt: A torneira está pingando de novo esta manhã.
translations.vi: Vòi nước lại rò rỉ sáng nay.
translations.ar: الصنبور يقطر مرة أخرى هذا الصباح.
translations.hu: A csap ma reggel megint szivárog.
translations.hi: नल आज सुबह फिर टपक रहा है.
translations.el: Η βρύση στάζει πάλι σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Kranen lekket igjen i dag morges.
translations.id: Keran itu bocor lagi pagi ini.
translations.sv: Kranen läcker igen nu på morgonen.
translations.ro: Robinetul picură din nou în această dimineață.
translations.da: Vandhanen lækker igen her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝も蛇口が漏れている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'robinet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'fuit'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here meaning 'to leak'.
Adverb modifying the verb; temporal/aspectual ('still').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of 'matin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; part of time NP 'ce matin' functioning as a temporal adverbial.

sentences.target: On change le robinet cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɑ̃ʒ lə ʁɔ.bi.nɛ sɛt a.pʁɛ mi.di/

translations.fr: On change le robinet cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɑ̃ʒ lə ʁɔ.bi.nɛ sɛt a.pʁɛ mi.di/
translations.en: We're changing the tap this afternoon.
translations.es: Vamos a cambiar el grifo esta tarde.
translations.de: Wir wechseln den Wasserhahn heute Nachmittag.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天下午换水龙头。
translations.yue: 我哋今日下晝要換水喉。
translations.pt: Vamos trocar a torneira esta tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו מחליפים את הברז אחר הצהריים.
translations.vi: Chiều nay chúng ta sẽ thay vòi nước.
translations.uk: Ми міняємо кран сьогодні після обіду.
translations.hi: हम आज दोपहर नल बदल रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αλλάζουμε τη βρύση σήμερα το απόγευμα.
translations.id: Kami akan mengganti keran sore ini.
translations.ja: 今日の午後に蛇口を交換します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun ('we'); triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'robinet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'change'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; allomorph used before vowel sounds; determiner of 'après-midi'.
Compound common noun (invariable gender); time expression functioning as a temporal complement.

sentences.target: J'entends le robinet couler dans la cuisine.
sentences.reading: /ʒɑ̃.tɑ̃ lə ʁɔ.bi.nɛ ku.le dɑ̃ la kɥi.zin/

translations.fr: J'entends le robinet couler dans la cuisine.
translations.ipa: /ʒɑ̃.tɑ̃ lə ʁɔ.bi.nɛ ku.le dɑ̃ la kɥi.zin/
translations.en: I hear the tap running in the kitchen.
translations.es: Oigo el agua del grifo corriendo en la cocina.
translations.de: Ich höre den Wasserhahn in der Küche laufen.
translations.it: Sento l'acqua del rubinetto scorrere in cucina.
translations.ko: 부엌에서 수도꼭지에서 물이 흐르는 소리가 들려요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我听到厨房的水龙头在流水。
translations.yue: 我聽到廚房個水喉喺度流水。
translations.ru: Я слышу, как на кухне течёт вода из крана.
translations.pt: Ouço a água da torneira correndo na cozinha.
translations.he: אני שומע את הברז זורם במטבח.
translations.vi: Tôi nghe vòi nước đang chảy trong bếp.
translations.ar: أسمع الماء يجري من الصنبور في المطبخ.
translations.nl: Ik hoor de kraan in de keuken lopen.
translations.uk: Я чую, як на кухні тече вода з крана.
translations.hu: Hallom, hogy a konyhában folyik a víz a csapból.
translations.hi: मुझे रसोई में नल का पानी बहने की आवाज़ सुनाई दे रही है.
translations.pl: Słyszę, jak w kuchni leci woda z kranu.
translations.el: Ακούω τη βρύση να τρέχει στην κουζίνα.
translations.nb: Jeg hører kranen renne på kjøkkenet.
translations.id: Aku mendengar air keran mengalir di dapur.
translations.sv: Jag hör kranen rinna i köket.
translations.cs: Slyším, jak v kuchyni teče voda z kohoutku.
translations.da: Jeg kan høre vandhanen løbe i køkkenet.
translations.fi: Kuulen, że keittiössä hanasta juoksee vettä.
translations.ja: 台所で蛇口の水が流れている音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic with elision before vowel-initial verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; perception verb taking a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'robinet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic direct object of 'entends' and semantic subject/controller of the infinitive 'couler'.
Infinitive verb; bare infinitival complement of 'entends' describing the action of 'robinet'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cuisine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'; locative complement.
